resolution.install_cmd: ( set -e; tmp=$(mktemp -d); mkdir "$tmp/x"; curl -fsSL 'https://github.com/BurntSushi/ripgrep/releases/download/15.1.0/ripgrep-15.1.0-x86_64-unknown-linux-musl.tar.gz' -o "$tmp/a"; tar xzf "$tmp/a" -C "$tmp/x"; cand=$(find "$tmp/x" -type f -perm /111 -name 'ripgrep' 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -z "$cand" ]; then cand=$(find "$tmp/x" -type f -perm /111 2>/dev/null | head -1); fi; install -m 0755 "$cand" /usr/local/bin/'ripgrep'; rm -rf "$tmp" )
